markdownRemark.html:
This is a test article created with the new bun run new-post script. The setup is working!

You can now easily write articles using markdown and the scaffolding system handles all the boilerplate for you. Just run:

bun run new-post "Your Article Title"

And you’re ready to write.

frontmatter.title: Welcome to the New Setup
frontmatter.description: Testing the new post scaffolding system
